name: codebase-impact accepts --rule-dir and aggregates results across all .yaml files in the directory
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/impact-preview.sh" --rule-dir "$PWD/rules" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>impact.txt && grep -oE "\"rule_id\":\"r[0-9]\"" impact.txt | wc -l | tr -d ' ' > count.txt && [ "$(cat count.txt)" = "3" ] && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
for i in 1 2 3; do printf 'source:
  id: src-%d
  authoritative_publisher: X
  authoritative_url: https://example.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - id: r%d
    name: r%d
    description: x
    detector: bash -c "grep -l x"
' "$i" "$i" "$i" > "rules/r${i}.yaml"; done
